text: Tenant-screening score allegedly relied heavily on credit history and non-tenancy debt in a way that disadvantaged Black and Hispanic rental applicants using housing vouchers. DOJ and HUD filed a statement of interest supporting Fair Housing Act disparate-impact applicability to algorithmic tenant screening.
canonical_source_conflicted: Fair Housing Act and voucher-backed rent-payment facts
mitigation_gap: No adequate fair-housing disparate-impact testing; model allegedly omitted or undervalued voucher payment certainty.
reliance_or_harm: Voucher holders allegedly denied housing; settlement created monetary and injunctive relief.
